data.current_description: Creates a new block in a stack. Note: Only custom stacks (created by your organization) can be modified.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new block in a stack
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new block within a specified stack. Only custom stacks created by your organization can be modified; system stacks are read-only. Accepts block configuration via CreateBlockRequest. Returns the newly created BlockDetailed object with all block properties and metadata.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description needed clarification on what constitutes a 'custom stack' vs system stacks, what input is expected, and what is returned. data.current_description: Adds a new fact entry to a block, automatically linking it to the most recent fact if one exists.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new fact entry within a block using CreateFactRequest. data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description needed clarification on return value (Fact object) and explicit mention of the side effect (automatic linking creates relationships). Added context about 'fact chain' to help AI agents understand the data structure implications.
